title: senecio lilloi
intro: Senecio lilloi, also known as Lillo's groundsel or Mountain senecio, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Senecio lilloi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
